detail.instructions: Add Gbp to the Currency enum and implement Currency::code(self) -> &'static str for USD, EUR, and GBP.

hints.body: Enums are updated by adding new variants separated by commas.
Add Gbp as a variant to the Currency enum, then match on self in code.
A canonical solution adds Gbp and centralizes the ISO text mapping.

detail.completionExplanation: Updating the enum and code method extends the supported domain concept while keeping external ISO text mapping centralized.

cases.name: money-direct-fields
